name: Raccoon Adventure: City Simulator 3D
author: Poki
description: Raccoon Adventure Simulator 3D is the next game by CyberGoldFinch. This time you are dressed up as a raccoon and scavenging the city to survive. Complete all kinds of different missions in the game to gain points and become the coolest raccoon in town. Maybe you could even evolve into "The Coon"..... How to play: Move - W/A/S/D Look around - Cursor Action - LMB About the creator: CyberGoldFinch created this game and many more animal simulator games. You can also try Horse Simulator, Dog Simulator and Tiger Simulator. If you are more into archery, then try Archer Master.
